what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links an attachment identifier to a board item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
id is att-ab63f6bf and channel is dragnet-development
standouts: Uses a board:// URI to reference a board item
Attachment file contains only metadata, no attached payload
conventions: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Uses a URI-style target reference for cross-entity linking
File-local attachment record stored under channel-memory/channel_attachments/
concerns: No payload or description of what is actually attached
Target board item cannot be resolved from this file alone
notes: A bare metadata stub that records when and to which board item an attachment was linked in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or artifact does this attachment represent?

purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is a board_items attachment targeting a board item, and the file does exactly that as a metadata record.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a persistent, discoverable link between a channel attachment and a board item for later retrieval, audit, or relationship traversal.
contribution: Provides a dated, typed pointer from an attachment identifier to a board item, enabling link traversal without embedding the referenced content.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata record under dragnet-development with attachment_type board_items, linking att-ab63f6bf to board item item-ac1b1c69 and recording an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record a link between a channel attachment and a specific board item for traceability.
